title: SKR short 20x +17.58% (EN)
body:
📊 Verified P&L — SKR/USDT Short · 20x · +17.58% (1h09m)

The idea: shorted SKR after a fast push stalled out and couldn't hold its highs — faded the exhaustion.

The risk: the stop sat just above the swing high that capped the push, set before we entered — moderate 20x, but the line where we'd be wrong was drawn first, not after.

Notice this one isn't a 100x flex. Smaller leverage, same discipline. The size of the multiplier didn't make the trade — knowing the exit-if-wrong before clicking buy did. Plan the loss, then let the position breathe.

⚠️ Past result, not a prediction. High leverage = high risk of total loss. Educational only, not financial advice.

#RealResults
